question: Diş implantı nedir?
title: Diş implantı nedir
direct_answer: Diş implantı nedir; diş hekimliğinde tanıya bağlı planlanan bir tedavi/uygulamadır. Endikasyon, görüntüleme ve ağız içi muayene ile belirlenir; kişiye özel malzeme ve süre seçilir.
bullets: Önce neden / endikasyon netleştirilir (muayene + görüntüleme).
Seçenekler avantaj–dezavantaj ve süre ile birlikte anlatılır.
Tedavi günü steril protokol ve dijital ölçü/üretim kullanılır.
Sonrasında hijyen ve kontrol randevuları kalıcılığı belirler.

faq.a: Diş implantı nedir; diş hekimliğinde tanıya bağlı planlanan bir tedavi/uygulamadır. Endikasyon, görüntüleme ve ağız içi muayene ile belirlenir; kişiye özel malzeme ve süre seçilir.
İşlem tipine göre aynı gün ile birkaç hafta arasında değişir; net süre planlama sonrası söylenir.
klinik Acıbadem’deki klinik implant, estetik, beyazlatma ve cerrahi dahil geniş bir yelpazede hizmet verir.

faq.q: Yurt dışından hasta kabul ediyor musunuz?
faq.a: Evet. Tedavi takvimi, transfer ve konaklama sağlık turizmi paketinde koordine edilebilir.

question: Eksik diş için en iyi çözüm nedir?
title: Eksik diş için en iyi çözüm nedir
direct_answer: Eksik diş için en iyi çözüm nedir genellikle altta yatan diş, diş eti veya alışkanlık kaynaklıdır. Kalıcı çözüm için nedenin teşhisi şarttır; geçici ev çözümleri yalnızca kısa süreli rahatlama sağlar.

question: Zirkonyum porselen kaplama nedir?
title: Zirkonyum porselen kaplama nedir
direct_answer: Zirkonyum porselen kaplama; yüksek dayanımlı zirkonyum alt yapı üzerine ışık geçiren porselen tabaka ile hazırlanan, doğal dişe yakın renk ve şeffaflık sunan bir restorasyondur. Estetik gülüş hattı ve arka dişlerde uzun ömür için tercih edilir.
bullets: Önce endikasyon netleştirilir (muayene + görüntüleme).
Seçenekler süre ve avantaj–dezavantaj ile anlatılır.
Tedavi günü steril protokol ve dijital planlama kullanılır.
Hijyen ve kontrol randevuları kalıcılığı belirler.

question: Diş bonding tedavisi nedir?
title: Diş bonding tedavisi nedir
direct_answer: Bonding; kompozit rezin malzemenin diş yüzeyine yapıştırılarak şekil, renk ve form düzeltmesi yapılan ağrısız bir estetik uygulamadır. Genellikle tek seansta tamamlanır; doğal diş dokusuyla sınır neredeyse görünmez.

question: Diş çekimi ağrılı mıdır? Güvenli süreç nasıl işler?
title: Diş çekimi ağrılı mıdır? Güvenli süreç nasıl işler
direct_answer: Profesyonel diş çekimi lokal anestezi (gerekirse sedasyon) ile ağrısız planlanır. Steril protokol, dijital röntgen ve kontrollü çekim sonrası gazlı bez ve ilaç protokolü ile iyileşme yönetilir.
bullets: Önce endikasyon netleştirilir (muayene + görüntüleme).

question: Gülüş tasarımı ve lamine veneer nedir?
title: Gülüş tasarımı ve lamine veneer nedir
direct_answer: Gülüş tasarımı; yüz oranları, dudak hattı ve diş formunun dijital analiziyle planlanır. Lamine veneer ince porselen yapraklardır; minimal aşındırma ile renk, şekil ve simetriyi kişiselleştirir.
bullets: Önce endikasyon netleştirilir (muayene + görüntüleme).

question: Çocuklarda ilk diş hekimi muayenesi nasıl olmalı?
title: Çocuklarda ilk diş hekimi muayenesi nasıl olmalı
direct_answer: Pedodontide ilk muayene oyun ve eğitimle başlar; fırçalama modeli, renkli aletler ve güvenli ortam çocuğun korkusunu azaltır. Erken kontrol çürük ve alışkanlık sorunlarını önler.

question: Sağlıklı diş eti neden önemlidir?
title: Sağlıklı diş eti neden önemlidir

question: What are zirconia crowns and why get them in Istanbul?
title: What are zirconia crowns and why get them in Istanbul
direct_answer: Zirconia crowns are metal-free restorations milled with CAD/CAM for strength and natural translucency. At MediDent Istanbul (Üsküdar Acıbadem), international patients typically complete planning, prep and fitting within a short stay — with transparent pricing after scan and exam.
bullets: Metal-free CAD/CAM zirconia with natural translucency.
Price after exam — material, tooth count and lab quality matter.
Short-stay protocol for EU dental tourism patients.
Aftercare and remote follow-up from MediDent Istanbul.

faq.a: Preparation is done under local anaesthesia. Mild sensitivity afterwards is normal and managed with your dentist’s protocol.

faq.q: Zirconia or porcelain veneers — which is better?
faq.a: Veneers suit mainly front-tooth aesthetics with less reduction. Crowns protect structurally compromised teeth. Choice depends on bite, tooth condition and smile goals.

faq.q: How long do zirconia crowns last?
faq.a: With good hygiene and check-ups, many last 10+ years. Grinding, trauma or poor care shortens lifespan — night guards may be advised.

faq.q: Can I fly from Germany or the UK for treatment?
faq.a: Yes. We compress the calendar where clinically safe and help with transfer and stay. Send photos/X-rays for a free preliminary plan.

question: What is dental bonding and how does it compare to veneers?
title: What is dental bonding and how does it compare to veneers
direct_answer: Dental bonding shapes tooth-coloured composite resin in one visit to fix chips, gaps and minor colour issues — usually with little or no enamel removal. Porcelain veneers are lab-made shells for more lasting, full smile makeovers. MediDent Istanbul helps you choose based on smile goals, budget and travel time.
bullets: Same-day composite bonding for chips, gaps and edges.
Porcelain veneers for lasting full-smile redesigns.
Honest indication — we do not upsell crowns when bonding is enough.
Photo-based free plan before you travel.

faq.a: Usually little to no anaesthesia is needed for small cases. Larger reshaping may use local anaesthetic.
Typically several years with good care; chips can be repaired. Porcelain lasts longer but costs more and needs prep.

faq.q: Can bonding be done in one day in Istanbul?
faq.a: Yes — that is one of its biggest advantages for short-stay dental tourists.
Hollywood Smile packages often use veneers/zirconia for a full arch transformation. Bonding suits subtler, faster changes.

question: How does dental tourism in Istanbul work for German and UK patients?
title: How does dental tourism in Istanbul work for German and UK patients
direct_answer: Dental tourism in Istanbul combines treatment (zirconia, bonding, implants, smile design) with a short city stay. MediDent Istanbul coordinates online consultation, airport transfer, hotel options and a compressed clinical calendar so patients from Germany and the UK can finish safely and return home with aftercare instructions.
bullets: Free photo-based plan before you book flights.
Transfer + hotel coordination near the clinic.
EN/DE patient support for EU travellers.
Indication-led zirconia, bonding and implant plans.

faq.q: Do you speak German and English?
faq.a: Yes — coordination and clinical communication are available in English and German for international patients.

faq.q: How many days should I stay?
faq.a: Bonding: often 1–2 days. Veneers/zirconia: commonly 4–7 days. Implants: depends on grafting and loading protocol.
Transfer and hotel coordination can be packaged on request with your treatment plan.

faq.q: What if I need a follow-up at home?
faq.a: We share documentation for your local dentist and stay reachable via WhatsApp for photos and questions.

question: What is sedation dentistry in Istanbul?
title: What is sedation dentistry in Istanbul
direct_answer: Sedation dentistry uses monitored IV sedation or related techniques so anxious patients can complete implants, extractions or smile makeovers comfortably. At MediDent Istanbul, vitals are tracked throughout; international patients can combine sedation with a short dental-tourism stay.
bullets: Monitored IV sedation for dental phobia.
Ideal for long implant or full-mouth sessions.
Recovery plan for hotel stay after treatment.
Available for EN/DE-speaking dental tourists.

faq.a: With proper screening and monitoring, modern sedation protocols are routinely used worldwide.
Conscious sedation keeps you responsive but deeply relaxed; general anaesthesia is reserved for selected cases.
Yes — tell us early so we plan anaesthesiology support and recovery time.
Type of sedation, duration and combined procedures determine the fee — quoted after assessment.

question: What are same-day dental implants?
title: What are same-day dental implants
direct_answer: Same-day implants place a titanium implant and, when primary stability allows, a temporary crown or bridge in one visit. Final zirconia or porcelain is fitted after healing. MediDent Istanbul evaluates bone with 3D imaging before promising immediate loading.
bullets: 3D planning before promising immediate teeth.
Temporary aesthetics on the surgery day when safe.
Final zirconia after osseointegration.
Tourist-friendly calendar and aftercare.

faq.a: No — only when stability and biology allow. We never force immediate loading.
Local anaesthesia ± sedation; post-op discomfort is managed with medication.
We discuss implant systems and warranty documentation before surgery.
Often suitable with a structured stay; ask for a photo/CT-based preview plan.

question: What is digital smile design with laminate veneers?
title: What is digital smile design with laminate veneers
direct_answer: Digital smile design analyses facial proportions and previews your veneers on screen before any irreversible prep. Laminate veneers are thin porcelain shells for colour, shape and symmetry — a core Hollywood Smile service for international patients at MediDent Istanbul.
bullets: On-screen smile preview before prep.
Laminate veneers for natural Hollywood Smile results.
Flight-synced treatment calendar.
Shade matching with clinical guides.

faq.a: Porcelain veneers usually need enamel reduction and are considered irreversible.
E-max/lithium disilicate for high translucency fronts; zirconia when more strength is needed.
Porcelain resists stains far better than composite bonding.

faq.q: Can I approve the design first?
faq.a: Yes — digital preview and in-mouth mock-up when indicated.

question: How does professional tooth extraction work in Istanbul?
title: How does professional tooth extraction work in Istanbul
direct_answer: Professional extraction uses anaesthesia, sterile technique and digital imaging. The tooth is removed atraumatically when possible; gauze and medication guide healing. At MediDent Istanbul, anxious tourists may combine extraction with sedation and implant planning in one trip.
bullets: Anaesthesia-first, sterile surgical protocol.
Digital X-ray guidance.
EN/DE aftercare sheets for tourists.
Optional link to implant replacement.

faq.a: You should be numb during the procedure; mild soreness afterwards is expected.
Impacted wisdom teeth may need surgical extraction with 3D planning.
Sometimes — depending on infection and bone. Assessed case by case.
Dissolvable or removable sutures depending on the site.

question: What is pediatric dentistry like at MediDent Istanbul?
title: What is pediatric dentistry like at MediDent Istanbul
direct_answer: Pediatric dentistry focuses on fear-free first exams, prevention and age-appropriate treatment. MediDent Istanbul uses play models and a calm environment — useful for expat and travelling families in Istanbul.
bullets: Play-based fear reduction.
Prevention-first philosophy.
Parent communication in EN/DE.
Family-friendly clinic environment.

faq.a: Often around the eruption of the first teeth or by age one — ask us for guidance.
We communicate with parents in English/German as needed.
Only when indicated and with strict safety protocols.
Contact us for urgent advice and appointments when available.

question: What is microscope-assisted root canal treatment?
title: What is microscope-assisted root canal treatment
direct_answer: Microscope-assisted root canal treatment cleans and seals canals under magnification to save a tooth that might otherwise be extracted. MediDent Istanbul uses this precision approach for locals and dental tourists who want to keep their natural tooth.
bullets: Magnified canal cleaning and sealing.
Tooth-first philosophy when predictable.
Crown protection planning for travellers.
Clear EN/DE explanations.

faq.a: With anaesthesia, the goal is a comfortable appointment; tenderness afterwards can occur.
Better visualisation of canals, cracks and missed anatomy.

faq.q: Do I need a crown after?
faq.a: Often yes for back teeth — we advise case by case.
Extraction and implant — discussed if the tooth is unrestorable.

question: Why is gum health essential before cosmetic dentistry?
title: Why is gum health essential before cosmetic dentistry
direct_answer: Healthy pink gums are the foundation for zirconia, veneers and implants. Bleeding or recession needs periodontal care first. MediDent Istanbul stabilises gums before aesthetic or implant work — critical for lasting dental-tourism results.
bullets: Gums first, cosmetics second.
Interdental hygiene coaching.
Protects zirconia and implant investments.
Fits into tourism calendars.

faq.a: No — usually a sign of inflammation that should be assessed.
Active gum disease should be controlled first.
From a single hygiene session to a multi-visit perio plan.
Yes — we can front-load hygiene before cosmetic days.

question: Was sind Zirkonkronen und warum Istanbul?
title: Was sind Zirkonkronen und warum Istanbul
direct_answer: Zirkonkronen sind metallfreie Restaurationen aus hochfestem Zirkonoxid, digital gefräst (CAD/CAM) und natürlich lichtdurchlässig. Bei MediDent Istanbul (Üsküdar Acıbadem) erhalten Patienten aus Deutschland und der EU nach Untersuchung und Scan einen klaren Plan — oft in einem kurzen Aufenthalt.
bullets: Metallfreies CAD/CAM-Zirkon mit natürlicher Transluzenz.
Preis nach Befund — Material, Zahnzahl und Laborqualität zählen.
Kurzurlaub-Protokoll für DE/AT/CH-Patienten.
Nachsorge und Remote-Follow-up.

faq.a: Die Präparation erfolgt unter Anästhesie. Leichte Empfindlichkeit danach ist normal und wird begleitet.
Veneers eignen sich vor allem für Frontzahnästhetik mit weniger Substanzabtrag. Kronen schützen strukturell geschwächte Zähne.
Mit guter Hygiene oft 10+ Jahre. Knirschen, Trauma oder mangelnde Pflege verkürzen die Lebensdauer.
Ja. Wir verdichten den Kalender, soweit medizinisch sicher, und helfen bei Transfer und Aufenthalt. Fotos/Röntgen für einen kostenlosen Vorabplan senden.

question: Was ist Zahn-Bonding und wie unterscheidet es sich von Veneers?
title: Was ist Zahn-Bonding und wie unterscheidet es sich von Veneers
direct_answer: Bonding formt zahnfarbenes Komposit oft in einer Sitzung — ideal für Absplitterungen, Lücken und kleine Formkorrekturen, meist ohne starkes Beschleifen. Keramikveneers sind laborgefertigte Schalen für langanhaltende Smile-Designs. MediDent Istanbul wählt die Indikation nach Ziel, Budget und Aufenthaltsdauer.
bullets: Same-Day-Bonding für Chips, Lücken und Kanten.
Keramikveneers für dauerhafte Smile-Designs.
Ehrliche Indikation — kein Upselling.
Kostenloser Foto-Plan vor der Reise.

faq.a: Bei kleinen Fällen oft ohne Betäubung; größere Formungen ggf. mit Lokalanästhesie.
Mehrere Jahre mit guter Pflege; Keramik hält in der Regel länger.
Ja — ein großer Vorteil für Kurzurlaub-Patienten.

faq.q: Bonding oder Hollywood Smile mit Zirkon?
faq.a: Hollywood-Smile-Pakete nutzen oft Veneers/Zirkon für die ganze Front. Bonding ist subtiler und schneller.

question: Wie funktioniert Zahntourismus in Istanbul für Patienten aus Deutschland?
title: Wie funktioniert Zahntourismus in Istanbul für Patienten aus Deutschland
direct_answer: Zahntourismus in Istanbul verbindet Behandlung (Zirkon, Bonding, Implantate, Smile Design) mit einem Kurzurlaub. MediDent Istanbul koordiniert Online-Beratung, Flughafentransfer, Hoteloptionen und einen verdichteten Behandlungsplan — mit deutscher Betreuung und klarer Nachsorge.
bullets: Kostenloser Foto-Plan vor dem Flug.
Transfer + Hotelnahe Unterkunft.
Deutsche Patientenbetreuung.
Indikationsgeleitete Zirkon-/Bonding-/Implantatpläne.

faq.a: Ja — Koordination und Aufklärung sind für internationale Patienten auf Deutsch möglich.
Bonding: oft 1–2 Tage. Veneers/Zirkon: häufig 4–7 Tage. Implantate: je nach Aufbau und Belastung.
Transfer und Hotelkoordination können auf Wunsch mit dem Plan gebucht werden.
Dokumentation für Ihren Zahnarzt vor Ort; wir bleiben per WhatsApp erreichbar.

question: Was ist eine sedierte Zahnbehandlung in Istanbul?
title: Was ist eine sedierte Zahnbehandlung in Istanbul
direct_answer: Bei der Sedierung werden Angst und Anspannung medikamentös gesenkt, während Vitalparameter überwacht werden. MediDent Istanbul bietet ruhige Behandlungen für Impantate, Extraktionen oder Smile-Design — auch im Rahmen eines kurzen Istanbul-Aufenthalts.

Ideal für lange Implantat- oder Full-Mouth-Sitzungen.

Bei Bewusstseinssedierung bleiben Sie ansprechbar, aber tief entspannt.
Ja — früh anmelden, damit Anästhesie und Erholung geplant werden.
Art, Dauer und kombinierte Eingriffe bestimmen den Preis — nach Einschätzung.

question: Was sind Sofortimplantate (Zähne am selben Tag)?
title: Was sind Sofortimplantate (Zähne am selben Tag)
direct_answer: Sofortimplantate setzen bei ausreichender Primärstabilität ein Implantat und ein Provisorium in einer Sitzung. Die endgültige Zirkon- oder Keramikversorgung folgt nach Einheilung. MediDent Istanbul prüft den Knochen per 3D, bevor Immediate Loading zugesagt wird.
bullets: 3D-Planung vor Sofortversprechen.
Provisorische Ästhetik am OP-Tag wenn sicher.
Definitives Zirkon nach Osseointegration.
Touristenfreundlicher Kalender.

faq.a: Nein — nur bei geeigneter Stabilität.
Lokalanästhesie ± Sedierung; postoperative Beschwerden werden medikamentös begleitet.
Systeme und Garantiedokumente besprechen wir vor dem Eingriff.
Häufig mit strukturiertem Aufenthalt — Vorabplan per Foto/CT.

question: Was ist digitales Lächeln-Design mit Laminat-Veneers?
title: Was ist digitales Lächeln-Design mit Laminat-Veneers
direct_answer: Digitales Smile Design analysiert Gesichtsproportionen und zeigt Veneers am Bildschirm, bevor irreversibel beschliffen wird. Laminat-Veneers sind dünne Keramikschalen für Farbe, Form und Symmetrie — Kernleistung für internationale Patienten bei MediDent Istanbul.
bullets: Bildschirm-Preview vor der Präparation.
Laminat-Veneers für natürliches Hollywood Smile.
Flugsynchroner Kalender.
Professionelle Farbnahme.

faq.a: Meist nicht — Schmelzreduktion ist üblich.
E-max für maximale Transluzenz vorne; Zirkon bei höherer Belastung.
Keramik ist deutlich farbstabiler als Komposit-Bonding.
Ja — digital und ggf. Mock-up im Mund.

question: Wie läuft eine professionelle Zahnentfernung in Istanbul ab?
title: Wie läuft eine professionelle Zahnentfernung in Istanbul ab
direct_answer: Professionelle Extraktion erfolgt unter Anästhesie, steril und bildgebungsgeführt. Der Zahn wird möglichst atraumatisch entfernt; Gaze und Medikamente steuern die Heilung. Bei MediDent Istanbul können ängstliche Touristen Sedierung und Implantatplanung kombinieren.
bullets: Anästhesie-first, steriles Protokoll.
Digitale Röntgenführung.
DE/EN-Nachsorgeblätter.
Optionaler Übergang zum Implantat.

faq.a: Währenddessen sollten Sie betäubt sein; danach leichte Beschwerden möglich.
Retiniert ggf. chirurgisch mit 3D-Planung.

faq.q: Extraktion und Implantat in einer Reise?
faq.a: Manchmal — abhängig von Infektion und Knochen.
Je nach Situation resorbierbar oder zu entfernen.

question: Wie läuft die Kinderzahnheilkunde bei MediDent Istanbul?
title: Wie läuft die Kinderzahnheilkunde bei MediDent Istanbul
direct_answer: Kinderzahnheilkunde setzt auf angstfreie Erstuntersuchungen, Prävention und altersgerechte Behandlung. MediDent Istanbul arbeitet mit Spielmodellen und ruhiger Atmosphäre — ideal für Familien und Expats in Istanbul.
bullets: Spielbasierte Angstreduktion.
Prävention zuerst.

Aufklärung der Eltern auf Deutsch/Englisch möglich.
Nur bei Indikation und strengen Sicherheitsregeln.

question: Was ist eine mikroskopgestützte Wurzelbehandlung?
title: Was ist eine mikroskopgestützte Wurzelbehandlung
direct_answer: Die mikroskopgestützte Wurzelbehandlung reinigt und füllt Kanäle unter Vergrößerung, um den Zahn zu erhalten. MediDent Istanbul nutzt diesen Präzisionsansatz für lokale und internationale Patienten.
bullets: Vergrößerte Kanalaufbereitung.
Zahnerhalt wenn vorhersagbar.
Kronenplanung für Reisende.

question: Warum ist gesundes Zahnfleisch vor der Ästhetik so wichtig?
title: Warum ist gesundes Zahnfleisch vor der Ästhetik so wichtig
direct_answer: Gesundes, rosa Zahnfleisch ist die Basis für Zirkon, Veneers und Implantate. Blutung oder Rückgang brauchen zuerst Parodontaltherapie. MediDent Istanbul stabilisiert das Zahnfleisch vor ästhetischen Eingriffen — entscheidend für nachhaltige Zahntourismus-Ergebnisse.
bullets: Zahnfleisch zuerst, Ästhetik danach.
Interdental-Hygiene-Coaching.
Schützt Zirkon- und Implantat-Investitionen.
